km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis於大約1150年出生在英國。她和Richard De Hywis至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis于大约1150年出生在英国。她和Richard De Hywis至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hywis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: variant of Hawes with rounding of -a-.
2  English: sometimes perhaps a variant of   Huish  .

variants.name: Hawes
meanings: of Norman origin, from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English Haueis, Hawis, from an Old French form of the ancient Germanic female personal name Hadewidis (from had- ‘war’ + wid- with a range of possible original meanings).
variant of Haw , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Huish
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Huish (Somerset, Wiltshire, Devon, Dorset), named with Old English hīwisc ‘household, family, measure of land sufficient to support a family’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis was born about 1150, in England. She had at least 1 son with Richard De Hywis.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis est née environ 1150, à Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard De Hywis.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis wurde um 1150 in England geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard De Hywis mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis è nata il circa 1150 nel England. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard De Hywis.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywisは約1150年にイギリスで生まれた。彼女はRichard De Hywisとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis(은)는 대략 1150년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard De Hywis(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Richard De Hywis.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis родилась около 1150 г. в местности Англия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard De Hywis.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard De Hywis nació aproximadamente 1150, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard De Hywis.
